evidence.fact: The system presents a real-time overview of stock by type, upcoming expirations within a week, and active orders.

evidence.claim: The threshold for alerts is 5 units per blood type.
evidence.fact: A shortage alert is triggered whenever the available stock for any blood type falls below five units.
evidence.fact_span: A shortage alert is triggered whenever the available stock for any blood type falls below five units

evidence.claim: The system tracks inventory by ABO/Rh blood type.
evidence.fact: The matching algorithm finds compatible inventory units based on standard ABO and Rh donor rules, prioritizing exact matches then closest expiry.
evidence.user_story_span: tracks inventory by ABO/Rh blood type
evidence.fact_span: The matching algorithm finds compatible inventory units based on standard ABO and Rh donor rules
